title: Implement manager property reserve/release/status mutation endpoints
description: Add backend endpoints and service operations so manager app can execute reserve, release, and status transitions with role guardrails and deterministic responses.
acceptance_criteria: API exposes manager-scoped mutation endpoints for reserve, release, and status update
Mutations enforce auth/role validation and return conflict-safe error payloads
Feature tests cover success, forbidden role, session invalid, and conflict/validation scenarios
